title: picea excelsa f. clanbrassiliana
intro: Picea excelsa f. clanbrassiliana, also known as Clanbrassil's spruce, is a variant of the Picea excelsa or silver fir tree, native to Ireland. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clanbrassil's spruce include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of Clanbrassil's spruce involves making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the needles or bark, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
